creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
rene        2011-05-03 19:56:24 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel/ros_comm       Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    devel/ros-common_msgs Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    devel/ros-documentation Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    devel/ros-rx         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    math/ros-geometry    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Forced commit to note repocopy:
  - devel/ros_comm, devel/ros-documentation, and devel/ros-rx cloned from
    devel/ros (to follow the upstream 1.4 versions, WIP)
  - devel/common_msgs -> devel/ros-common_msgs and
    math/geometry -> math/ros-geometry for consistency (now all ROS ports
    start with 'ros')
  PR:             ports/155328
  Repocopy by:    marcus
  Submitted by:   myself
